Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Event (PDE)/Drug Characteristics Codebook │ July 2025 │ V 1.8 35 

PD_DT 

LABEL: Paid Date 

DESCRIPTION: The date on which the plan originally paid the pharmacy for the prescription drug. 

SHORT NAME: PD_DT 

LONG NAME: PD_DT 

TYPE: DATE 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: PDE 

VALUES: Date formatted as CCYYMMDD 

COMMENT: This is an optional field.
